'''ân-th-p''' ('''kanathap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:standardize|standardize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:standardize|standardize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-th-p
|-
! Lemma
| kanathap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinathap|thinathap]] || [[word:jinathap|jinathap]] || [[word:shinathap|shinathap]] || [[word:kinathap|kinathap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunathap|thuthunathap]] || [[word:jujunathap|jujunathap]] || [[word:shushunathap|shushunathap]] || [[word:kukunathap|kukunathap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunathap|thunathap]] || [[word:junathap|junathap]] || [[word:shunathap|shunathap]] || [[word:kunathap|kunathap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunathap|thunathap]] || [[word:junathap|junathap]] || [[word:shunathap|shunathap]] || [[word:kunathap|kunathap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenathap|thenathap]] || [[word:jenathap|jenathap]] || [[word:shenathap|shenathap]] || [[word:kenathap|kenathap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonathap|thothonathap]] || [[word:jojonathap|jojonathap]] || [[word:shoshonathap|shoshonathap]] || [[word:kokonathap|kokonathap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonathap|thonathap]] || [[word:jonathap|jonathap]] || [[word:shonathap|shonathap]] || [[word:konathap|konathap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonathap|thonathap]] || [[word:jonathap|jonathap]] || [[word:shonathap|shonathap]] || [[word:konathap|konathap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnathap|thĂŠnathap]] || [[word:jĂŠnathap|jĂŠnathap]] || [[word:shĂŠnathap|shĂŠnathap]] || [[word:kĂŠnathap|kĂŠnathap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanathap|thathanathap]] || [[word:jajanathap|jajanathap]] || [[word:shashanathap|shashanathap]] || [[word:kakanathap|kakanathap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanathap|thanathap]] || [[word:janathap|janathap]] || [[word:shanathap|shanathap]] || [[word:kanathap|kanathap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanathap|thanathap]] || [[word:janathap|janathap]] || [[word:shanathap|shanathap]] || [[word:kanathap|kanathap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanathap|shanathap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanathap|goshanathap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanathap|gokishanathap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanathapnĂŒ|shanathapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanathapnknĂŒ|goshanathapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanathapnĂŒ|gokishanathapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanathapshĂ«|shanathapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanathapnkshĂ«|goshanathapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanathapshĂ«|gokishanathapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanathapro|shanathapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanathapnkro|goshanathapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanathapro|gokishanathapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanathapmu|shanathapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanathapnkmu|goshanathapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanathapmu|gokishanathapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanathapsher|shanathapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanathapnksher|goshanathapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanathapsher|gokishanathapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanathapng|shanathapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanathapnkng|goshanathapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanathapng|gokishanathapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanathapya|shanathapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanathapnkya|goshanathapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanathapya|gokishanathapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanathapyam|shanathapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanathapnkyam|goshanathapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanathapyam|gokishanathapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanathapnĂŒshĂ«|shanathapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanathapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanathapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanathapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanathapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanathapnĂŒro|shanathapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanathapnknĂŒro|goshanathapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanathapnĂŒro|gokishanathapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanathapnĂŒmu|shanathapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanathapnknĂŒmu|goshanathapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanathapnĂŒmu|gokishanathapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanathapshĂ«nĂŒ|shanathapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanathapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanathapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanathapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanathapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanathapshĂ«ro|shanathapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanathapnkshĂ«ro|goshanathapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanathapshĂ«ro|gokishanathapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanathapshĂ«mu|shanathapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanathapnkshĂ«mu|goshanathapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanathapshĂ«mu|gokishanathapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanathapronĂŒ|shanathapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanathapnkronĂŒ|goshanathapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanathapronĂŒ|gokishanathapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanathaproshĂ«|shanathaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanathapnkroshĂ«|goshanathapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanathaproshĂ«|gokishanathaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanathapromu|shanathapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanathapnkromu|goshanathapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanathapromu|gokishanathapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanathapmunĂŒ|shanathapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanathapnkmunĂŒ|goshanathapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanathapmunĂŒ|gokishanathapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanathapmushĂ«|shanathapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanathapnkmushĂ«|goshanathapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanathapmushĂ«|gokishanathapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanathapmuro|shanathapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanathapnkmuro|goshanathapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanathapmuro|gokishanathapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
